## Description

* * *

[![NVX - Worth the Envy - Direct to Consumer Car Audio](https://www.sonicelectronix.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,width=300/img/ads/pdp_description_rail/desktop.jpg)](https://www.sonicelectronix.com/m725-nvx.html)

[![Metra brand icon](https://www.sonicelectronix.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,width=768/https://www.sonicelectronix.com/images/manufacturer/metra_icon_2020.jpg)](https://www.sonicelectronix.com/m70-metra.html)

Authorized dealer

This stereo installation kit has been engineered to help you install either a 2” tall (Single-DIN) or a 4” tall (Double-DIN) aftermarket radio into the original vehicle dashboard. This dash kit makes radio replacement simple and comes with a pocket that is installed below the 2” radio to fill the extra space in the radio opening, which can be used for storage. The pocket is not needed when installing a 4” tall radio. The dash kit is painted to match the original look and feel of the vehicle’s dashboard. Installing an aftermarket radio can upgrade the sound quality and provide additional features the original factory radio couldn’t offer but requires this dash kit to make it fit.

### Product Features:

- Allows for installation of an aftermarket Single-Din or Double-Din car stereo
- Compatible with select 2007-2012 ES350
- Designed for models without factory navigation
- Allows for the retention of the factory climate controls in their original location
- Made from the highest quality ABS plastic for an original factory-like fit and finish
- Includes brackets and hardware parts needed with detailed installation instructions
- **Authorized Internet Dealer**
- 1-year Manufacturer's Warranty

### Kit Includes:

1. Radio Trim Panel
2. Brackets
3. Pocket
4. (8) #8 x 3/8” Phillips screws
5. Step by step instructions

#### The best Lexus ES350 dash kit there is... and the only one.



It looks very good once installed and the quality is fine once installed. However, you will have to take some additional steps to get it to fit correctly. In Kit Assembly, Step A, the supplied screws are too small to secure fit into the sides of the A/C circuit board plastic (I had to scavenge for some larger screws).

Otherwise, the kit fits great and looks "stock" (which is the highest praise there is for looks!).

One tip: During Kit Preparation, pay attention to Step 7 & 8 -- it's easy to miss the fact that you must take the plastic off the backside of the A/C controls and take the 4 screws out of the circuit board during the excitement of the installation!

# About this item

- VEHICLE COMPATIBILITY: Dash kit designed for 2006-2015 Lexus IS Series vehicles without factory navigation, allows installation of single or double DIN aftermarket radios.
- COMPLETE INSTALLATION KIT: Includes dash panel, storage pocket, touchscreen display panel, and wiring harnesses to retain climate controls, steering wheel controls, and passenger airbag indicator lights.
- PRECISION FIT DESIGN: Manufactured with precision tolerances for seamless integration with factory dash, featuring two-tone grey and black finish with factory-matched texture to blend with original interior.
- DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from high-grade ABS plastic for long-lasting durability and reliable performance in daily use.
- PACKAGE DIMENSIONS: Measures 13.50 inches wide by 11.50 inches deep by 3.50 inches high with a total weight of 3.70 pounds for easy handling during installation.

## Product Description

This comprehensive dash kit is designed specifically for select 2006 to 2015 Lexus IS Series vehicles without factory navigation. The kit enables you to seamlessly install either a double DIN radio or a single DIN radio with an included storage pocket into your vehicle's dashboard. Engineered with precision tolerances, this installation kit ensures a gapless, factory-quality fit that integrates perfectly with your existing dash. The kit retains essential functions including climate controls, steering wheel controls, passenger seat belt indicator, and airbag warning lights. Constructed from high-grade ABS plastic, the components feature a two-tone grey and black finish with factory-matched texture that blends naturally with your Lexus interior. The complete package includes a storage pocket, touchscreen display panel, and necessary wiring harnesses for a professional installation. Please note that this kit will not retain the factory amplifier. Transform your vehicle's entertainment system while maintaining the sophisticated appearance and functionality your Lexus is known for.
